_note: Clean evaluation of v3.0.23 best.pt (mega_iter6/train8/weights/best.pt) against human-labeled cottonweeddet12 test + valid splits. Class IDs remapped from original cottonweeddet12 order to v3.0.23 merged order via name match. Job 40293571, Apr 25 2026 13:18 EDT, V100-32GB.

yolo11n_FT_v3_0_6_baseline._note: Old baseline: YOLO11n fine-tuned on cottonweeddet12 alone (5648 imgs), 100 epochs, V100-32GB. From CHANGELOG 2026-03-16 entry.

key_finding: Adding 175K autonomous-collected images REGRESSED mAP50-95 from 0.87 to 0.40 vs the simple YOLO11n baseline trained on only cottonweeddet12. Per-class breakdown shows 4 species (Eclipta, Goosegrass, Morningglory, Nutsedge) have near-zero mAP, indicating the model failed to learn them despite training data containing samples. Hypothesis: signal dilution by off-target datasets (plantvillage, rice-disease, etc.) + OWLv2 mislabel pollution. This is a publishable negative result — autonomous web-scale data collection without domain filtering hurts accuracy.
